entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, my date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check that for you.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks, Marcus. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I need to cancel an appointment I had scheduled. There’s a conflict that came up, so I can’t make it. Could you help me with that?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check your upcoming appointments. You have three upcoming appointments on Monday, June 22nd. Which one would you like to cancel, the one with Dr. Duvy Hauser, Abraker, or Dr. Zed Bignew-Lakowski?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'd like to cancel the appointment with Dr. Doogie Howser. That's the one I won't be able to make.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please give me a brief reason for the cancellation.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I have a scheduling conflict that came up unexpectedly. That's the reason I need to cancel.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Confirm you want to cancel your Monday, June 22nd appointment with Dr. Duby Hauser. Your appointment for Monday, June 22nd with Dr. Duby Hauser has been canceled. What else can I help with?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Thanks for your help. That’s all I needed for now. Have a great day.
